news.title: French Inflation Quickens to Highest Since August 2024 on War
news.description: French inflation accelerated to the fastest pace since August 2024 as the Iran war sent energy costs surging, adding to pressure on the European Central Bank to tighten monetary policy.

stocks.ai_explanation: Exxon Mobil Corporation (XOM) is a major American multinational corporation involved in the exploration, production, refining, marketing, distribution, and sale of petroleum products worldwide. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

Chevron Corporation (CVX) is a leading integrated oil and gas company engaged in the exploration, development, production, transportation, processing, and marketing of hydrocarbons. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Neste Oyj (NEE) is a Finnish producer of renewable fuels such as biofuels and aviation kerosene. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
Shell plc (SHEL) is a multinational energy company headquartered in London, United Kingdom, that operates in more than 70 countries. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.
British Petroleum (BP) is a multinational oil and gas company based in London, England. This is an educational summary, not financial advice.

disclaimer: Educational use only. Not financial advice.
